nlPage.guideTitle: How to write a good question
nlPage.guideDesc: This tool generates queries directly from your schema — it does not reason over free-form text or general knowledge. Phrase your question as a composition of the tables, fields, and relationships that exist in your data.
nlPage.guideRuleNames: Use the names of your entities, not synonyms ({{entity}}, not {{synonym}})
nlPage.guideRuleFilters: Specify filters, groupings, and aggregations the way you would in a query
nlPage.guideRuleSchema: If a field or relationship is not in your schema, it cannot be queried
nlPage.example1: Show all customers whose orders total more than 10,000, grouped by region
nlPage.example2: List the top 5 products by revenue in the last 30 days
nlPage.example3: Find all users who have never placed an order
nlPage.questionPlaceholder: Ask a question in plain English…
nlPage.notApplicable: Not applicable for this query type
